events.title: Brooklyn Spring Market – Markets for Makers
events.description: Markets for Makers is coming back to Brooklyn on April 25 + 26 from 11am – 5pm both days! Located at Industry City, come shop 90+ makers, craft at DIY stations, snap pics at photo walls, enjoy delicious snacks and drinks, and fill your free tote with goods from small businesses! Plus, kids under 12 are free, so bring your whole family along for this amazing event!

events.title: IC Design Crawl
events.description:
Spend the day exploring Industry City’s Design District—shop furniture and home décor across campus, discover in-store activations, and enjoy giveaways, prizes, and more.
A Campus-Wide Shopping Event
The IC Design Crawl is a one-day event celebrating Industry City’s growing Design District. Visitors are invited to explore multiple furniture and home retailers, discover new brands, and experience activations throughout the campus.
From showrooms and studios to courtyards and outdoor spaces, the day is designed to encourage exploration, discovery, and cross-shopping across Industry City.
Explore activations, promotions, and experiences across participating retailers, including:

ABC Carpet & Home Outlet – Enter-to-win and light refreshments
Brooklyn Candle Studio – Seconds sale (up to 50% off; bring your own bag)
CityFoundry – New works by Brooklyn-based artist Brian Knauer
DWR Outlet – Storewide promotion (30% off)
Kohler – 10% off storewide + in-store activation and photo moment 
Porcelanosa – Spring sale (up to 40% off) with light refreshments
RH Outlet – Sip-and-shop activation
West Elm Outlet – Outdoor furniture showcase
Oasiq – Explore outdoor furniture designs displayed across campus
Hardman – Sample Sale (Pop-up space in Building 2) Up to 50% off tables, chairs, sofas, storage, and more, including ex-display pieces, prototypes, archived designs, and select stock

Shop + Win
Make a purchase and take part in our Spin-to-Win giveaway.
How it works:

Spend $100+ at participating furniture and home retailers
Show your receipt at the Spin-to-Win station (Building 3)
Spin the wheel and win prizes from across the IC community

Prizes include:

Climbing passes from Hapik
Fort Hamilton Distillery experiences and products
Gifts from Brooklyn Candle Studio
Chocolates from Li-Lac Chocolates
Carreau Club merchandise
Industry City merchandise
And more to be announced

All Spin-to-Win participants will be entered to win the Ultimate Day at Industry City, a curated package of group experiences across campus, including:

Hapik — Family & Friends climbing pass
Brooklyn Candle Studio — Italian Coast Candle
Brooklyn Pop — Exhibition passes for a group of 4
Fort Hamilton Distillery — Tour/tasting experience for a group of up to 6
Carreau Club — Two-hour pétanque experience for up to 8 (includes court rental, adjacent seating, pétanque guide, and welcome snacks)
The Frying Pan Brooklyn — $100 gift card
Craftsman Ave — $300 gift card

ADDITIONAL CAMPUS PROGRAMMING (APRIL 25)

NYC Hot Sauce Expo (The Box Factory)

The 13th annual festival featuring top hot sauce makers, tastings, and live programming—drawing thousands of attendees to campus.
1-5PM


Market for Makers 5-2-A

A curated marketplace featuring independent makers, artists, and small businesses offering handmade goods, apparel, and home items.
11AM-5PM


Rock and Roll Playhouse @ the Bandshell 

Music of the Grateful Dead & Bob Dylan
1-5PM 


Brooklyn Made Store — “Turn Up the Heat: Design Crawl Edition” (Bldg 5)

Salsa lounge with DJ and lounge seating (in partnership with Oasiq)
Hot sauce tasting experience
Curated display of design-forward products

events.title: Rock and Roll Playhouse Play Music of Bob Dylan & Grateful Dead
events.description:
Tickets: https://wl.eventim.us/Getitrightthefirsttime
PLEASE NOTE: All children must be accompanied by a parent or adult caregiver. Kids 1 and under are free. Everyone else needs a ticket. We try to keep the volume low, but we strongly encourage ear protection for everyone. Now for the fun stuff!
Industry City and Get It Right Music are proud to welcome back The Rock and Roll Playhouse for a series of shows this summer in our outdoor bandshell! The opening date features the music of Bob Dylan and Grateful Dead!
These shows will feature two sets!
The 1pm opening set is the traditional interactive Rock and Roll Playhouse family set with another “all ages” set for everyone’s enjoyment from approximately 230-430 pm!
Event Info
Date: April 25, 2026
Doors: 12:30pm
Rock and Roll Playhouse set:1:00-2:00pm
Rock and Roll Party for everyone: 2:30-4:30pm
Tickets: $12.50 per person plus fees
Family of Four-pack: $25 per family plus fees
Address: Industry City Bandshell Stage, Courtyard 1/2 at Industry City in Brooklyn New York between 36th and 37th street and 2nd and 3rd Avenues.
ENTER 238 36th Street, Brooklyn, NY on your GPS device
The venue is located in an open-air courtyard featuring a full concert sound stage. Fans can order food from over 17 options inside the adjoining food hall. Concert is rain or shine.
How to get here:
Take the D, N, R lines to 36th street station in Brooklyn and walk west one block to Industry City. 3 stops from Manhattan. 30 minutes from Herald Square.
From Long Island, take the LIRR to Atlantic Terminal then take the D, N or R train to 36th street.
More About the Rock and Roll Playhouse
The Rock and Roll Playhouse, a family concert series hosted at historic music venues across the country, allows kids to “move, play and sing while listening to works from the classic-rock canon” (NY Times). Performing songs created by the most iconic musicians in rock history, The Rock and Roll Playhouse band offers its core audience of families with children age ten and under games, movement, stories and an opportunity to rock out in an effort to educate children and explore their creativity. The Rock and Roll Playhouse is an early and often first introduction to a child’s lifelong journey with live music and rock and roll. See you at the show!
This concert for kids and families shares the music of the artist named above with a new generation of music lovers, but is not associated with or endorsed by the artist. All children must be accompanied by a parent or adult caregiver.
The Rock and Roll Playhouse knows that little ears are sensitive, so we turn down the volume at our shows. However, all kids experience music differently and you may find that your child is more comfortable wearing hearing protection earmuffs, such as Baby Banz, which are available for purchase here.
By attending this event, I consent to my image (with or without my voice) being included in photographs and/or film and videotape of the event, and give Brooklyn Bowl, The Rock and Roll Playhouse and their respective licensees and assigns the absolute and irrevocable right and permission to use and publish such content in any and all media, whether now known or hereafter developed.

events.title: Comedian CP
events.description:
Comedian CP is a writer/performer whose comedy special SUNDAY AFTER SIX debuted on VEEPS in 
May 2025. He was most recently staffed on the second season of DIARRA FROM DETROIT for BET+. 
Additionally, he was a writer/producer and recurred on HOW TO DIE ALONE for Hulu/Onyx and 
starred in the second season of the HBOMax anthology series LOVE LIFE.
Previously, CP was on a talent holding deal with CBS for the 2019-2020 season after starring in 
their pilot HISTORY OF THEM. He starred in OLE BUD’S ANU FOOTBALL WEEKLY, a special he co-
created for Adult Swim and recurred as “Ned” on the critically acclaimed Comedy Central series 
DETROITERS.
Prior to the entertainment business, CP was a rising advertising executive in Detroit. Since arriving 
in Los Angeles, CP has recurred on EMPIRE, performed on ALL DEF COMEDY (HBO), and created 
and starred in the TBS pilot THE D.

events.title: Turn Your Social Media Into Sales
events.description:
Your social media should help bring in business, not create more guesswork.
If you’re not sure what to post, when to post, or how to make social media actually support your business [and you don’t have the time to keep guessing] this workshop is for you.
Join us for “Turn Your Social Media Into Sales”
This one-hour session is designed to help business owners create strategic content that drives real results. You’ll be introduced to a simple framework for building social media content with purpose, so every post has a clear job to do.
You’ll learn how to:
• Create content that helps new customers discover your business
• Turn interest into action with posts that drive inquiries and sales
• Keep customers engaged so they come back and stay connected
Whether you’re just getting started or posting regularly without seeing results, you’ll leave with a practical framework you can apply right away.
Space is limited — RSVP to reserve your spot.
events.vendor: Turn Your Social Media Into Sales
